message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant NavBar
participant ReduxStore
participant UserActions
participant UserReducer
participant ProfileMiddleware
participant Solid.js
participant POD

actor NavBar
participant ReduxStore
participant UserActions
participant UserReducer
participant ProfileMiddleware
participant Solid.js
participant POD

NavBar ->> ReduxStore: loadEmailRequest()
ReduxStore ->> UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailRequest())
UserActions ->> ReduxStore: loadEmailRequest()
ReduxStore ->> UserActions: state

alt [email successfully loaded]
ReduxStore ->> UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailSuccess(email))
UserActions ->> ReduxStore: loadEmailSuccess(email)
ReduxStore ->> UserReducer: updateState(email)
UserReducer ->> ReduxStore: updated state with email
ReduxStore ->> NavBar: state

alt [error at loading email]
ReduxStore ->> UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailError(error))
UserActions ->> ReduxStore: loadEmailError(error)
ReduxStore ->> UserReducer: updateState(error)
UserReducer ->> ReduxStore: updated state
ReduxStore ->> ProfileMiddleware: error
ProfileMiddleware ->> Solid.js: error
Solid.js ->> POD: error

end

@enduml
